overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Origins showing the protagonist Bayek walking through a moonlit desert canyon. The character moves steadily along a sandy path between rocky cliffs under a bright full moon in a clear night sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: open desert valley approaching canyon entrance

agents.ego_description: Bayek walking steadily through open desert terrain toward the canyon entrance, with weapons and equipment visible on his back

entered.detail: Large rocky mountain formation forming the left boundary of the desert valley
Steep sandstone cliff rising on the right side of the valley
Sand-covered ground with visible vehicle tracks and footprints
Bright full moon providing illumination in the clear night sky
Sparse small bushes and shrubs scattered on the desert floor

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a wide desert valley at night, with Bayek walking toward a distant canyon entrance. The full moon illuminates the sandy terrain and distant mountain ranges, while sparse vegetation dots the landscape. The camera follows steadily from behind as the character approaches the narrowing canyon passage.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow desert canyon passage with steep rock walls

events.description: environment transitions from open desert valley to enclosed canyon passage as rock walls close in on both sides

agents.ego_description: Bayek continuing through the narrower canyon section with high rock walls now flanking both sides of the path

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions into a narrower canyon passage where the rock walls draw closer on both sides. The sandy path continues winding through the enclosed terrain, with the moon still visible overhead. The vegetation disappears as the environment becomes more rugged and enclosed by the steep canyon walls.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a wide desert valley that gradually narrows into a rugged canyon passage. It begins with Bayek walking across an expansive sandy terrain under a bright full moon, with distant mountain ranges and sparse vegetation visible in the open landscape. As the character advances, the camera follows steadily from behind, moving toward a narrowing gap in the horizon. The scene then shifts as the environment becomes more enclosed, with steep rock walls drawing closer on both sides and the vegetation disappearing. Finally, the path winds deeper into the rugged canyon, leaving the open valley behind while the moon remains visible overhead.
